methods.description: Process for determining concentrations of chlorophyll a (Chl a), particulate organic carbon (POC), particulate organic nitrogen (PON), particulate organic phosphorus (POP), and biogenic silicate (BSi) in samples.

steps.description: Chl a concentration was determined from duplicate, sub-samples filtered onto glass fiber filters (Whatman GF/F) and extracted in 10 ml of 94% ethanol for 24 h in darkness at room temperature.
steps.searchable_summary: extract Chl a from samples using ethanol and measure concentration

steps.description: Chl a was measured on a Cary, Varian Eclipse spectrofluorometer, calibrated with pure Chl a (Sigma).
Duplicate filters were also prepared for determination of POC, PON, POP, and during the stationary growth phase also biogenic silicate (BSi).
steps.searchable_summary: prepare filters for POC, PON, POP, and BSi determination

steps.description: For POC, PON, and POP, acid-washed, pre-combusted GF/F filters were used, and BSi samples were filtrated onto 0.8 μm polycarbonate filters.
steps.searchable_summary: use specific filters for POC, PON, POP, and BSi

steps.description: The filters were allowed to dry and stored at room temperature (20°C) until determination of the element quantity.
steps.searchable_summary: dry and store filters for later analysis

steps.description: POC and PON were measured from the same filter with a mass spectrometer (Europa Scientific).
steps.searchable_summary: measure POC and PON using mass spectrometer

steps.description: POP was determined according to Solórzano and Sharp.
steps.searchable_summary: determine POP using Solórzano and Sharp method

steps.description: Filters for BSi determinations were digested using methods of Krausse et al.
The filters were leached with NaOH in boiling water, neutralized with HCl, and analyzed directly for dissolved silicate (DSi) using standard colorimetric procedures.

methods.description: Procedure for determining the photosynthesis-irradiance (PE) relationship using O2 production and 14C fixation methods.

steps.description: Determination of the photosynthesis-irradiance (PE) relationship was conducted with both O2 production and 14C fixation.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct PE relationship determination using O2 and 14C methods

steps.description: The PE incubator is a prototype constructed by B.G. Mitchell with a halogen light source and water-cooled chambers.
steps.searchable_summary: use PE incubator for sample incubation

steps.description: For each incubation, 2 dark and 12 light points were used for O2 determination and 2 dark and 16 light points for 14C uptake measurements.
steps.searchable_summary: set up incubation points for O2 and 14C measurements

steps.description: The O2 concentration was determined using a fiber optic oxygen sensor, calibrated against 0 and 100% air saturation.
steps.searchable_summary: measure O2 concentration with fiber optic sensor

steps.description: Carbon incorporation was determined using the 14C isotope.
Radioactivity of the samples was determined using a liquid scintillation counter.
steps.searchable_summary: measure sample radioactivity with scintillation counter

steps.description: The PE relationship was examined by fitting the function of Platt et al. to the obtained data.
steps.searchable_summary: fit Platt et al. function to PE data

steps.description: The photosynthetic quotient (PQ) was calculated by dividing the gross O2 production by the C fixation.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate PQ from O2 production and C fixation
